The '''Byss Bistro''', also known as the '''Spacer's Bistro''', was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], the reborn [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] throneworld.

==History==
It was located at the base of the [[Imperial Freight Complex]]. Although only pilots hauling Imperial cargo were allowed to land on Byss, [[Salla Zend]] was able to recruit a few smugglers with [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] sympathies at the bistro to help rescue [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], and their team of commandos, whose mission to Byss had been defeated by the Emperor's mutant [[chrysalide]]s. The pick-up was a success, and the team escaped to the hidden world of [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]].
